records.summary: Tambah field file_url di GET /scylla-pjp/v1/live-monitoring-distributor dan /live-monitoring-principal (SX-2421, SX-2422). Source: mobile.visits.file_url (visit terbaru per cust/emp/outlet/date). Distributor reuse pola GetDistributorLatestVisitCoordinates; principal tambah correlated subquery di select GetPrincipalMonitoring & GetPrincipalExtraCalls. Tipe *string, json tanpa omitempty.
decisions: Pakai *string FileURL; NULLIF di select untuk normalisasi empty jadi null. Subquery SELECT (bukan window) untuk principal demi simplicity. subagent-handoff-check.py butuh fenced block JSON dengan key handoff: di root; YAML mini parser-nya overwrite nested map, jadi JSON lebih aman.

records.summary: Tambah field file_url di GET /scylla-pjp/v1/live-monitoring-distributor dan /live-monitoring-principal (SX-2421, SX-2422). Source: mobile.visits.file_url (visit terbaru per cust/emp/outlet/date). Distributor reuse pola GetDistributorLatestVisitCoordinates; principal tambah correlated subquery di select GetPrincipalMonitoring & GetPrincipalExtraCalls. Tipe *string, json tanpa omitempty.
decisions: Pakai *string FileURL; NULLIF di select untuk normalisasi empty jadi null. Subquery SELECT (bukan window) untuk principal demi simplicity. subagent-handoff-check.py butuh fenced block JSON dengan key handoff: di root; YAML mini parser overwrite nested map. JWT lokal: HS256 secret=secret (development.env). Endpoint prefix /api/v1. Di DB lokal ggn_scyllax, principal pjp_principles.rows tidak overlap dengan mobile.visits (file_url selalu null di response principal); distributor pada B000005/salesman 3012241/2026-07-02 menunjukkan file_url populated.

records.summary: Added pjp GET /v1/monitoring_locations/update-locations with tenant-scoped full-day timeline, no pagination, DTO/service/repository/controller/route coverage, and evidence.
decisions: Tracked principal outlet_visit_list schema lacks destination_type, so both outlet branches return nullable destination_type rather than inventing an unsafe join.

records.summary: SX-2508 sales import/parser and DetailV2 quantity orientation fixed. Local build and scoped tests pass; two unrelated promotion consult tests remain red; no live staging verification without fresh SCYLLAX_TOKEN.
decisions: Keep global converter internal orientation small/middle/large; remap only at DetailV2 API boundary.
Mapped sales orders preserve stored qty triples and skip conversion.

records.summary: Created harness docs (PROJECT_STACK/COMMANDS/FRAMEWORK_PLAYBOOK/DETECTED_TOOLS, TOOL_USAGE, AGENT_TOOL_ACCESS), DESIGN.md as API surface design system, canonicalized AGENTS.md with Source Rules pointer, and harmonized CLAUDE.md/.cursorrules via rules-harmonizer.py
decisions: Backend-only Go monorepo: DESIGN.md reframed to API surface (response envelope, error contract, endpoint conventions) instead of visual UI

records.summary: SX-2513 product secondary sales report delivered: POST /master/v1/products/report added to master with parameter-bound count/data, composite parent join, closed sort allowlist, and full test/build PASS. Quality gate verdict PASS_WITH_RISKS: A3 parent-missing behavior remains open and runtime smoke is not-ready because compose is empty and no token available.
decisions: Repository uses sqlx.In+Rebind for cust_id list; A1 fake service stub originally had stale 2-return signature and was synchronized to 4-return during A2 remediation; quality gate verified A1/A2/A3 evidence and diff boundary.

records.summary: SX-2513 remediation A4 closed: live ggn_scyllax revealed mst.m_distributor has 38 rows per cust_id, multiplying report join 38x (API 148846 vs actual 3917 for C22001, duplicate pro_id). Fixed by grouping md into BOOL_OR(COALESCE(allow_upload_secondary_sales,false)) derived relation before join. Live re-validated: API total 3917 == DB 3917, 0 duplicate pro_id in 100-row page; C260020004 mapping fixture (6 rows) parent-normalizes correctly against C26002. Quality gate re-reviewed and issued PASS (superseding prior PASS_WITH_RISKS).
decisions: mst.m_distributor is not unique per cust_id in this dataset; any join on cust_id must aggregate first. Chose BOOL_OR across all distributor rows per cust_id as the smallest compliant flag semantic; documented as open assumption pending product-owner confirmation only if disputed.

records.summary: SX-2513 A5 closed production null pro_id crash: parent normalization now guarded by parent.pro_id IS NOT NULL; SQLMock covers both missing-parent (mp primary + original_* null) and eligible-parent (parent primary + original_* mp) branches. Live production revalidation blocked by expired bearer token in user prompt. A4 distributor aggregation + A5 fallback = final SQL invariants for report release slice.
decisions: After A4 closes duplicate distributor join, A5 adds parent-pro-id-not-null guard before CASE normalize; products must never return NULL pro_id even if parent missing or inactive; if parent gone, fall back to mp fields and original_* null, type still Product Mapping.

records.summary: Fixed GET /v1/products/report route shadowing in master service by registering literal GET before :pro_id; added two router-level tests with portable t.Chdir setup.
decisions: Single-line route registration reuses existing Report handler for GET and POST; regression tests derive module root from runtime.Caller.
